author: shimashimarin
body:
- Update Sherpa to v2.2.16, which include a bugfix of [Enhance_Factor](https://gitlab.com/sherpa-team/sherpa/-/releases/v2.2.16).
- Include HepMC3 when building Sherpa. To be ready for the [GenTask#53](https://gitlab.cern.ch/cms-gen/gen_tasklist/-/issues/53).
- Clean/update some patch files.

[Recola1](https://recola.gitlab.io/) integration as in PR #10200  could be postponed and discussed further.
title: [Sherpa] Update Sherpa to 2.2.16 and compile with HepMC3
